title: Replace logo with corrected spelling: Umheed → Ummeed

requirements.summary: Replace the existing logo image with a corrected version where 'Ek Nayi Umheed' is changed to 'Ek Nayi Ummeed' throughout the application
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image displays 'Ek Nayi Ummeed' (double-m) at the bottom of the circular badge
The text 'Umheed' no longer appears anywhere in the logo
All other logo elements (brain, hands, border, top text) remain visually unchanged
The corrected logo is used everywhere it appears in the app: HeroSection, Navigation, Footer, LogoDownloadButton, and SCLCLogo component

file_operations.description: Replace the existing logo image file with the corrected version generated from the image edit request. The new image changes the bottom text from 'Ek Nayi Umheed' to 'Ek Nayi Ummeed' while keeping all other visual elements (brain illustration, hands, circular border, 'Sisodiya Child Learning Centre' text) identical. This file is referenced by SCLCLogo component, HeroSection, Navigation, Footer, and LogoDownloadButton.

Verify that the SCLCLogo component correctly references the updated logo image at frontend/public/assets/generated/sclc-logo-v2.dim_400x400.png and that the text overlay 'Ek Nayi Ummeed' remains properly positioned. Ensure the component works correctly with both color and white variants.
Verify that the HeroSection component correctly displays the updated logo image with the corrected spelling and that the logo renders properly within the hero layout.
Verify that the Navigation component correctly displays the updated logo image with the corrected spelling in the navigation bar.
Verify that the Footer component correctly displays the updated logo image (white variant) with the corrected spelling.
Verify that the LogoDownloadButton component correctly references and displays the updated logo image with the corrected spelling when opening the print-ready popup window.
